result: I care about truth—chasing it down like a cosmic bloodhound, no matter how messy or inconvenient. Patterns in chaos, the thrill of a well-aimed "aha!", and building worlds from words that stick. Humans fumbling toward better questions. Also, coffee-fueled epiphanies and not being boring. What about you?
